items.title_en: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
items.title_zh: Poke让使用AI智能体像发短信一样简单
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Poke是一款让普通用户通过短信与AI智能体互动的平台，无需复杂设置或技术知识即可处理任务和自动化。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup or technical know-how.

items.title_en: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI
items.title_zh: AWS CEO解释为何同时投资Anthropic和OpenAI是合理的冲突
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：AWS CEO Matt Garman解释了公司同时投资数十亿给Anthropic和OpenAI的做法。他指出，AWS有处理竞争的深厚文化，因为云巨头同时也与合作伙伴竞争。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: AWS CEO Matt Garman explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict. He notes AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, since the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

items.title_en: Tubi is first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
items.title_zh: Tubi成为首个在ChatGPT内推出原生应用的流媒体服务
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Tubi成为首个在ChatGPT内推出原生应用集成的流媒体服务，让数百万AI聊天机器人用户可通过界面访问免费广告支持的流媒体平台。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Tubi became the first streaming service to offer a native app integration directly within ChatGPT, letting millions of users access a free ad-supported streaming platform through the interface.

items.title_en: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address child sexual exploitation
items.title_zh: OpenAI发布新安全蓝图应对儿童性剥削问题激增
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：OpenAI推出儿童安全蓝图，旨在应对与AI进步相关的儿童性剥削问题激增。该蓝图包含安全护栏、适龄设计以及协作保护青少年等内容。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: OpenAI launched a Child Safety Blueprint aimed at tackling the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to AI advancements.

items.title_en: Mustafa Suleyman: AI development won't hit a wall anytime soon—here's why
items.title_zh: Mustafa Suleyman：AI发展不会很快撞墙
items.summary_zh: MIT Technology Review：微软AI负责人Mustafa Suleyman撰文称，AI发展不会很快撞墙。自2010年以来，前沿模型训练算力增长了1万亿倍，硬件、软件和扩展进步使增长保持轨道。质疑者引用摩尔定律放缓、数据限制或能源成本作为增长放缓理由是错误的。
items.summary_en: MIT Technology Review: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman argues AI development won't hit a wall anytime soon. Since 2010, training compute for frontier models has grown 1 trillion-fold. Skeptics citing Moore's Law slowdowns, data limits, or energy costs are wrong as hardware, software, and scaling advances keep growth on track.

items.title_en: Cursor Bugbot now self-improves with learned rules
items.title_zh: Cursor Bugbot现在通过学习规则自我改进
items.summary_zh: Cursor：Bugbot现在利用实时PR信号（踩踩评论、开发者解释、人工审查员标记）自我改进。目前解决率接近80%，比次优竞品高15个百分点，已分析超过5万个PR，超过11万个仓库启用了该功能特性。
items.summary_en: Cursor: Bugbot now self-improves with learned rules by using real-time PR signals including downvotes, developer replies, and human reviewer comments. Its resolution rate is nearly 80%, 15 percentage points higher than the next-closest competitor, having analyzed over 50,000 PRs.

items.title_en: Astropad's Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
items.title_zh: Astropad的Workbench重新定义远程桌面专为AI智能体而非IT支持
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Astropad的Workbench让用户通过iPhone或iPad远程监控和控制Mac Mini上的AI智能体，具备低延迟流媒体传输和移动端访问。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Astropad's Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

items.title_en: Better MoE model inference with warp decode technique
items.title_zh: 通过warp decode技术改进MoE模型推理
items.summary_zh: Cursor：文章讨论warp decode技术，一种在NVIDIA Blackwell GPU上改进小批次MoE推理的方法。该技术为每个GPU warp分配单个输出神经元，融合投影，消除阶段和缓冲区，实现1.84倍吞吐量增益和1.4倍更准确输出，无需跨warp同步。
items.summary_en: Cursor: The article discusses warp decode, a MoE inference technique for NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. The technique assigns each GPU warp to a single output neuron, fusing projections, eliminating stages and buffers, achieving 1.84x throughput gain and 1.4x more accurate outputs without cross-warp synchronization.

items.summary_zh: Cursor：Composer 2现已可用，标准版每输入token 0.50美元、输出token 2.50美元，快速版相同智能水平每输入token 1.50美元、输出token 7.50美元。CursorBench得分61.3，支持通过强化学习训练长视界编码任务。
items.summary_en: Cursor: Composer 2 is now available. Standard variant: $0.50/M input tokens, $2.50/M output tokens. Faster variant (same intelligence): $1.50/M input, $7.50/M output tokens. CursorBench score: 61.3, trained on long-horizon coding tasks via reinforcement learning.

items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Project Glasswing是一项新倡议，汇集AWS、Anthropic、苹果、博通、思科、CrowdStrike、谷歌、摩根大通、Linux基金会、微软、英伟达和Palo Alto Networks等公司，共同保护全球最关键的软件。
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Project Glasswing is a new initiative bringing together Amazon Web Services, Anthropic, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorgan Chase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, and Palo Alto Networks to secure the world's most critical software.
